Off Calendar Jun-12-2007 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Dirk D. Larsen, Esq., appearing for Defendant. Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed by Plaintiff or Counsel present today. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings reported by: Rita Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. (212)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Independent Neurological Examination (With Psychologic Component)
Off Calendar Oct-19-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Peter Gilbert, Esq., for Sandra Dees, Plaintiff/Opposing Party
Kurt Bridgman, Esq., for Bay Area Rapid Transit District, Defendant/Moving Party

Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Defendan Bay Area Ra[id Transit District's Motion To Compel Independent Neurological Examination With Psychological Component is granted, limited to the manner, scope, and nature of the physical examination, interview regarding emotional, social, and psychological variables relevant to subjective pain complaints, somatization, and subjective symptoms related to Complex Regional Pain Syndrome or Reflex Sympathetic Dystrophy COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Psychological Examination And Neuro-Psychological Testing Of The Pltf
Off Calendar Oct-06-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearance:
Kurt Bridgman, Esq., for Defendant Bay Area Rapid Transit Disctict, Defendant/Moving Party.
Peter Gilbert, Esq., for Sandra Dees, Plaintiff/Opposing Party

Hearing held: Mo to compel neuro-psychological and psychological examination is denied. Plaintiff is barred from offering a claim for mental and emotional distress over and aobve that usually associated with the physical injuries claimed and further, that no expert testimony regarding this usual mental and emotional distress will be presented at trial in support of the claim for damages. This order is made without prejudice to a request for a neurological examination, possibly including a psychological component, upon showing of good cause. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
